prompt: A dramatic close-up of a golden energy sphere rotating slowly in empty space. White-hot core radiates golden neural tendrils that branch and pulse with data flow. No people, no text overlays. Color palette: warm off-white (#FAFAF8), gold (#FFD700), soft gray (#E5E5E0). Aspect ratio 16:9. Cinematic quality. Bloomberg meets Apple aesthetic.
